title: Herom's Physgun
description: Adds Physgun (Gravity gun) in your game!
body:
**Please download the resourcepack from additional files :)**

_Stay tuned for new version :) coming soon_

   This data pack adds physgun into the game. With this gun you can move blocks and entities around, or launch them into sky! 

Crafting requires 1 glowstone, 1 obsidian, 1 diamond, 2 iron ingot, 4 ender pearl. Place them in a dropper with this order:

![Physgun recipe in dropper (v1.1)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/429681d33eaa4dc3b1e3eae35d23aebde95e824e.png)

Then viola, you crafted the physgun! 

**Controls:**
 - **Right-click:** pick up block/entity and release block/entity. 
 - **Shift + Right-Click:** Throw block/entity. 


**Lil demo:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ihIVK-A4ugo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


------------------------------------------------------------------

Special thanks to [gravyarts](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/gravyarts/) for Physgun model and its textures!  

Sfx by Valve
